text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. Instead of just reading words, NLP allows machines to grasp the meaning behind the text, including context and intent. This technology powers many tools we use daily, such as automatic translation between languages and sentiment analysis, which detects whether a piece of writing is positive, negative, or neutral. It also makes chatbots possible, enabling them to respond naturally to customer questions. By combining language rules with machine learning, NLP continues to improve how we communicate with technology.
